name: BTK200C Fresnel 200W

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C7C13D81-F73F-4AF9-84C8-F32A898DBED4

comment: BTK200C Fresnel 200W CW/WW Manual Zoom: The BTK200C is a compact and easy-to-maintain LED Fresnel spotlight with a versatile 15°-40° beam angle. Utilizing a two-stage focusing optical system, this fixture creates a soft and uniformly illuminated field of cool or warm white light with a high Color Rendering Index (CRI). Crafted from durable die-cast aluminum, the stylishly designed BTK200C combines the functionality of traditional tungsten fixtures in combination with optimized color correction for video cameras. P-Con in/out and 3-pin DMX in/out connections are standard equipment on this Fresnel, ensuring compatibility with your existing equipment and a simple installation process. Ideal for TV studios, conference rooms, theaters, houses of worship, and more, the BTK200C is designed to meet your lighting needs with precision and style.
